channel.title: Registry on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Registry on Pi Stack

item.title: Docker Registry Proxy Cache: Distribution vs Harbor vs Zot 2026
item.description: If you run Docker containers across multiple hosts or CI/CD pipelines, pulling images from Docker Hub repeatedly is wasteful. You hit rate limits, waste bandwidth, and slow down deployments. A self-hosted Docker registry proxy cache solves all three problems.
